creator: milios@ccsys.com
text: Nah, don't worry about those. They're both behind the v0.16.2 in PR #231167 now, which is a release version. If i feel the need for a -beta again i'll submit a new PR. I may put one together some day. As of right now it seems that the guy working on the "Manage Names Tab" GUI (the work i'd pulled into the -beta port) has some other things sapping his free time.
